experience.title: Electronic Systems Operations Intern
bullets: Engineered shop-aid models in Creo and 3D printed using Prusa Slicing software to help with operator inspection efficiency
Reduced defects with shop-aids for room-temperature vulcanizing silicone inspection on 500 circuit boards worth $600,000
Improved manufacturing instructions in 200 Factory Logix plans with descriptive titles and modified reroute settings
Conducted electrostatic discharge testing in circuit board packaging and transporting materials for dispersion sufficiency
Led a meeting regarding RTV defect reduction and presented internship achievements in front of managers and peers

experience.title: Mechanical Engineer Intern
bullets: Assisted in the design and analysis of HVAC systems for office, commercial, and residential spaces, working towards customer satisfaction, minimal energy consumption, and compliance with building codes
Collaborated with senior engineers to create detailed system schematics, ductwork layouts, and demolition plans in AutoCAD
Gained proficiency in working with and identifying mechanical HVAC equipment specifications for use in designs
Performed on-site surveys of existing HVAC installations and demolished spaces, recording specifications, drawing schematics, and taking measurements of existing mechanical equipment and ductwork

education.institution: Binghamton University, State University of New York, Thomas J. Watson College of Engineering and Applied Science
highlights: Relevant Coursework: HVAC, Energy Engineering, Computational Fluid Dynamics, Finite-Element Analysis, Aerodynamics

education.institution: Binghamton University, State University of New York, Thomas J. Watson College of Engineering and Applied Science

projects.name: Senior Design Project: Formula Electric Vehicle Accumulator
projects.description: Led a team of four in the mechanical design and cooling analysis for a Li-ion battery pack for use in a Formula Electric Vehicle. Secured sponsorship from Tesla and Analog Devices. Designed battery pack container in SOLIDWORKS using tab-and-slot alignment system.
projects.outcome: Secured sponsorship resulting in savings of over $6,000. Analyzed battery pack air cooling system for SAE temperature compliance using Ansys Fluent.

projects.name: Landing Gear Design Project
projects.description: Modeled a fully functional R2D2 landing gear in adherence to requirements using PTC Creo Parametric. Conducted static analysis using PTC Creo. Performed finite element analysis through ANSYS Workbench.
projects.outcome: Summarized findings, including detailed drawings, mathematical analysis, and cost analysis in a 50-page written report

leadership.description: Advise undergraduate and graduate students on preparing quality job/internship application materials. Coordinate networking events and career exploration sessions each month. Organize the career services website using OmniUpdate.
leadership.scope: Undergraduate and graduate students at Watson College

leadership.description: Managed and revised bid proposals throughout 2022-2024 student competitions. Organize Binghamton University MCA Golf Tournament Fundraiser. Tour local companies in heating, air conditioning, refrigeration, plumbing, piping industries.
leadership.scope: Placed 5th in 2024 competition for Kansas City Zoo Aquarium, winning $1,000 grant
